the objective of joint intelligence operations is to?

qas.a: To provide information and assessments to facilitate accomplishment of the mission

qas.a: Ensure security and safety for noncombatants and civilians

qas.a: development of detailed collection plans that are domain-specific

qas.a: Space-based ISR enables global ISR coverage over denied areas

qas.a: Retask the sensor and follow up with remedial actions
